content: Phaser 4.1.0 'Salusa' released April 30 2026, is now the stable version. Install: npm install phaser (latest on npm is 4.1.0). Canvas renderer is DEPRECATED in Phaser 4 — WebGL-only from v4. The renderer uses a node-based architecture. For Mandelbrut Week-1 pure engine: use raw Canvas2D API directly (not Phaser), since the engine must be Devvit-importable and pure. Phaser 4 for Week-3+ Phaser-prize attempt: requires WebGL context, may work in Devvit webroot iframe but needs verification. Phaser 3.x (3.90.0) still works with Canvas but is legacy. Config type: Phaser.GameConfig, type: Phaser.AUTO (auto-selects WebGL or Canvas fallback, but Canvas is deprecated). For mobile: powerPreference 'low-power', autoMobileTextures: true (restricts to 1 texture/batch on iOS/Android).
